title: txt2book
body:
# txt2book

This mod allows you to import books or articles from supported websites and convert them into in-game Minecraft books.

**Supported Websites:**
- Telegraph (good)
- Ponyfiction (good)
- Ficbook (good with small texts)
- .docx documents (WIP)

You can set up a proxy in the config.

## How to Use
To import a book, use the following command:

`/txt2book <source> <workId> [signed]`

**Example:**

`/txt2book ponyfiction 333`

This will import the story from `ponyfiction.org/story/333` and give you a Minecraft book.

You can also specify whether the book should be signed (`minecraft:written_book`) or unsigned (`minecraft:writable_book`). By default, the book will be signed.

**Examples:**
- `/txt2book ponyfiction 333 true` ‚Äì Creates a signed book.
- `/txt2book ponyfiction 333 false` ‚Äì Creates an unsigned, writable book.

**Finding `workId`:**
- Ficbook: `ficbook.net/readfic/**10936980**` ‚Üí Work ID is `"10936980"`
- Ponyfiction: `ponyfiction.org/story/**220**` ‚Üí Work ID is `"220"`
- Telegraph: `telegra.ph/**Pikabu-Puls-August-2024-09-16**` ‚Üí Work ID is `"Pikabu-Puls-August-2024-09-16"`

![Example of a Minecraft book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1e198c24ef28a0302e9e332ffad538cf2808d5.png)

## Admin Commands
- `/txt2book reload` ‚Äì Reloads the configuration.
- `/txt2book resetCache` ‚Äì Clears the book cache, allowing faster access to recently imported books.

## Permissions
By default, all commands are restricted to server operators. You can adjust access using the permission system.

- `ru.pyxiion.txt2book` ‚Äì Permission to use the main command.
- `ru.pyxiion.txt2book.ficbook` ‚Äì Permission to import books from Ficbook.
- `ru.pyxiion.txt2book.ponyfiction`
- `ru.pyxiion.txt2book.telegraph`
- `ru.pyxiion.txt2book.docx`
- `ru.pyxiion.txt2book.reload` ‚Äì Permission to reload the mod configuration.
- `ru.pyxiion.txt2book.resetCache` ‚Äì Permission to reset the book cache.

## Configuration
File: `config/txt2book.toml`

Parameters:
- `config_version` ‚Äî do not modify this value.
- `lang` ‚Äî mod language. You can set "ru" or "en", or add your own language.
- `maximum_file_size` ‚Äî maximum size for imported files.
- `[characters]`, `[characters.category]`, `[characters.width]` ‚Äî system parameters.
- `[langs.X]` ‚Äî messages for language X.

## Language Support
The mod supports both English and Russian. You can select or add languages in the configuration file (`txt2book.toml`).

## Some limitations
The mod does not support all possible letters. It filters them out if the mod doesn't know their size.

### About docx importing
The first title in a document is considered the title of the book. All subsequent titles are chapter titles.

## Plans 
- Improve .docx importing
- Improve Ficbook importing


---

Let me know if you found a bug or have a suggestion, such as adding a new source.

[![Fabric API required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b95cf1ebb9ac4309bff7cf28785abe1f75881c7.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
